title: [release-1.9] remove square/jose, and bump to ocicrypt v1.1.8
body: Remove the dependency for vendor/gopkg.in/square/go-jose.v2 which ensures that we address cve-2024-28180

comments.body: I've just added this to see how bad it is, I'm not convinced on the mergeability yet.

@mtrmac if you please, let's merge this to be ultra safe.  Happy green test buttons.

This follows #2293 and obliberates  https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c5q2-7r4c-mv6g
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-30788

Thx once again for the very thorough review @mtrmac :star:
